_comment: Phase 0 baselines. Captured 2026-05-11 on an Apple Silicon dev box; CI on ubuntu-latest will produce different absolute numbers but the +/-20% tolerance lets the gate ride through normal variance. Re-baseline (delete this file, run `cargo bench`, copy criterion medians here) whenever the underlying bench bodies in `crates/world/benches/world_bench.rs` materially change.

frontend.console_fcp_ms._note: Frontend FCP bench at packages/frontend/bench/fcp.spec.ts is currently test.describe.skip; CI wires the ceiling as a hard assertion when that bench unskips.
